MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Lavon Granger.
Peter J. Veiguela, Esq. for Plaintiff Information Leasing Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants, The Timple Bar, LLC., Union Square Hotel Co. LLC., Embassy Hotel, LLC., Sheehan Hotel, Inc., Sutter Street Recreation Co., and The Fizgerald Hotel (see attachment 5a of the JUDGMENT).
Damages of $295,519.02
Attorney's fees of $21,915.00
Costs of $2,575.47
Interest of $141,849.12
For the total of $461,858.61
Judgment signed in open court.
